# @zakkster/lite-headless / tabs

Headless tabs primitive built on the v0.7.4 roving-focus core. A
tablist with N triggers and N panels, one active at a time. Active
state reactive; controllable via signal or attribute.

## API

createTabs({
    defaultValue,                        // initial active key
    value?:        Signal<string>,       // controlled mode
    orientation:   "horizontal" | "vertical",  // default horizontal
    activation:    "automatic" | "manual",     // default automatic
    loop:          boolean,              // default true
    typeahead:     boolean,              // default false (off by design)
    onValueChange: (key, reason) => void,
})

  attachTablist(el)
  attachTab(el, key, { disabled?: boolean })
  attachPanel(el, key)

  value()                       // current active key
  setValue(key, reason?)
  setDisabled(key, flag)        // fallback to next enabled if active gets disabled
  next() | prev() | first() | last()
  destroy()

## Activation modes

- "automatic" (default): ArrowKey moves focus AND activates the tab in
  one step. Non-destructive content where switching is free (most apps).
- "manual": ArrowKey moves focus only; user presses Enter/Space to
  activate. For destructive content (forms with unsaved state).

## Keyboard

horizontal: ArrowLeft / ArrowRight
vertical:   ArrowUp   / ArrowDown
Home / End: first / last enabled tab
Enter / Space (manual mode): activate focused tab

## ARIA

- Tablist:    role="tablist", aria-orientation
- Tab:        role="tab", aria-selected, aria-controls=<panelId>,
              roving tabindex (0 on selected, -1 on the rest)
- Tabpanel:   role="tabpanel", aria-labelledby=<tabId>, tabindex="0",
              `hidden` on inactive panels

## CSS contract

Each tab gets `data-active (boolean)`. Each panel gets the same
plus `hidden` when inactive. Style via:

  [data-tab][data-active]    { border-bottom: 2px solid; }
  [data-tab][:not([data-active])]  { color: var(--text-dim); }
  [data-panel][hidden]               { /* browser default: display:none */ }

## Custom element wrapper

<lite-tabs value="overview" orientation="horizontal" activation="automatic">
  <div data-tablist>
    <button data-tab="overview">Overview</button>
    <button data-tab="settings">Settings</button>
    <button data-tab="billing" data-disabled>Billing</button>
  </div>
  <div data-panel="overview">overview content</div>
  <div data-panel="settings">settings content</div>
  <div data-panel="billing">billing content</div>
</lite-tabs>

Dispatches `CustomEvent('valuechange', { detail: { value, reason } })`.
Mirrors active key to the host's `value` attribute so external
MutationObservers / route sync work naturally.
